videos.title: The Lonely American Dream: From Crisis to CoLiving | Samuel Wegert | TEDxCharlotte
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description:
Loneliness is rising. Housing costs are crushing working people. And homelessness continues to grow. In this TEDx talk, Sam Wegert argues the American Dream needs an update—and the answer might not be new construction, but unused space.

videos.title: Rethinking Strictness and Discipline | Justin Li | TEDxYCYW Shanghai Youth
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: In this inspiring TEDx talk, Justin Li shares how his strict badminton coach, once labelled the “Devil Coach”, taught him the true power of communication. videos.title: Infinite Effort, Zero Learning: The Sisyphus Problem | Strahinja Kukin | TEDxCSN Youth
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: Contemporary culture often encourages people to “embrace failure” as if failure itself guarantees improvement. Yet repetition alone does not necessarily lead to learning. The myth of Sisyphus illustrates infinite effort without development: the same action repeated endlessly without change. Failure

videos.title: The Fertilizer of Failure | Henry Yu Hin Dai | TEDxYCYW Shanghai Youth
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: Henry’s speech is about growth mindset and how we should embrace our mistakes as learning opportunities. Henry (Dai Yuxuan) is a Grade 4 student in Guangzhou. An enthusiastic explorer, he balances academic curiosity in the school library with athletic pursuits including football and competitive golf
